claim_boundary: TICKET105 proves an exact finite centering identity and isolates a progression-discrepancy target. It proves none of the four conjectures and no conjecture counterexample.

exact_centering.identity: T_X=sum mu(d)A0_X(d)+sum mu(d)(A_X(d)-A0_X(d)), with A0 using the coprime progression mean q/phi(q).
exact_centering.baseline_independence: A0 uses only divisibility, one-factor Lambda(r), exact block counts, and q/phi(q); it does not read Lambda(qm+2).
exact_centering.remaining_object: The centered term couples mu(d) to prime-distribution errors Lambda(drm+2)-dr/phi(dr) on odd progressions.

information_boundary.finding: Termwise negative centered mass and Cauchy-Schwarz discard the sign alignment needed for a K/log lower bound.

worst_negative_mass_row.progression_model: E[Lambda(qm+2)]=q/phi(q) when gcd(2,q)=1; zero when q is even, with exact finite multiple counts.

worst_cauchy_row.progression_model: E[Lambda(qm+2)]=q/phi(q) when gcd(2,q)=1; zero when q is even, with exact finite multiple counts.

information_boundary.scope: Finite audited failure of these envelopes is not a no-go for dispersion, large-sieve, or bilinear estimates that retain progression structure.

rows.progression_model: E[Lambda(qm+2)]=q/phi(q) when gcd(2,q)=1; zero when q is even, with exact finite multiple counts.

E[Lambda(qm+2)]=q/phi(q) when gcd(2,q)=1; zero when q is even, with exact finite multiple counts.

discarded_routes: Replace Lambda(drm+2) by a global mean 1 without parity and progression-density correction.
Bound every centered outer-divisor discrepancy independently.
Use Cauchy-Schwarz on the full centered d-vector as the final Type II estimate.
Treat finite small cosine as proof of uniform orthogonality.
twin_centered_progression_discrepancy.proof_boundary: TICKET105 proves an exact finite centering identity and isolates a progression-discrepancy target. It proves none of the four conjectures and no conjecture counterexample.

attempts.proof_or_counterexample_mode: preserve problem-specific target during Twin centered-discrepancy audit
attempts.attempt: Preserve the existing infinite target; no prime-progression shortcut is transferred across problems.
attempts.obstruction: TICKET105 supplies no new target-specific infinite theorem for this problem.
attempts.next_experiment: Continue NonCircularExplicitFormulaKernelPositivity with its own proof and counterexample oracle.
